import nl.tsym.tackbox.report.Report;

// JV009 (notify gate, D006): a Report.notify carrying the caught is a valid
// terminal only under a narrow catch. A notify in a broad catch routes every
// failure to the user lane and blinds telemetry.
class NotifyGate {
    // Narrow catch: the notify is credited (no JV001) and the type is the gate,
    // so JV009 stays silent.
    void narrowIsClean() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
        }
    }

    // Broad catch: the notify routes every failure to the user lane.
    void broadFires() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline"); // want "JV009"
        }
    }

    // A no-report marker above the catch body suppresses the gate.
    void markerSuppresses() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            // no-report: bootstrap notice, telemetry wired later in the boot sequence
            Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
